name: analyze
description: Run Go static analysis, formatting, build, and tests
prompt:
Run the full Go analysis pipeline for the masterfabric_go project:

1. go vet ./... - static analysis
2. gofmt -l . - check formatting
3. go build -o /tmp/masterfabric-server ./cmd/server - compile
4. go test ./... - run tests
5. go mod tidy - clean dependencies

Report any errors and suggest fixes following masterfabric_go conventions.
